title: Automation Notification Emails
excerpt: How can one choose the fields and formatting for both automation notification emails for forms that create projects? As it is, there is no formatting and all fields are just thrown in the email subject line.

posts.author: jeremynla (Jeremy Kesselman)
posts.cookedHtml: How can one choose the fields and formatting for both automation notification emails for forms that create projects? As it is, there is no formatting and all fields are just thrown in the email subject line.

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jeremynla, thanks for posting and welcome to the community!

What automation do you have set up, and what does it say in the “notify” field? This will help me get an idea of whether it will be possible to reformat. You’re also welcome to write in to support@monday.com for faster and more customized support on this!
